steps.title: Close the definition
steps.content: The parenthetical definition of a supernova must close after star. The next thought about where the blast occurred should begin a new sentence with a participial phrase.

steps.title: Avoid run-ons
steps.content: A creates faulty coordination with and occurring, C makes a comma splice, and D runs the ideas together without punctuation. A period after the parenthesis cleanly separates the two sentences. The answer is B.
